notes: <cite index="29-1,29-3">The Mamma Baguette was created in the late 1990s as a larger version of the iconic Baguette.</cite> <cite index="5-2">The majority of Fendi Baguette Mamma handbags feature the beloved signature Zucca double F print.</cite> <cite index="18-1">Documented examples show cotton canvas and leather construction with silver hardware and Italian origin.</cite> Color and condition_summary cannot be determined without seeing the specific item's images/description.
